productTitle: Ubiquiti airFiber 11 High-Band Backhaul Radio with Dish Antenna
name: Ubiquiti airFiber 11 High-Band Backhaul Radio with Dish Antenna
title: Ubiquiti airFiber 11 High-Band Backhaul Radio with Dish Antenna
description: The Ubiquiti AirFiber AF11-Complete-HB is a high-band backhaul radio system designed to operate in the 11 GHz licensed frequency band, offering a solution for networks that require liberation from the congested 5 GHz spectrum. This model is particularly suited for creating long-distance, point-to-point links, boasting capabilities such as a link range of over 300 kilometers and a throughput exceeding 1.2 Gbps. Such performance parameters make it an ideal choice for applications demanding high capacity and reliability over extensive distances, such as backhaul for wireless internet service providers, enterprise connectivity, or other large-scale network deployments.
